Gyproc/Saint Gobain. GI channel framework. Use moisture-resistant variant near TN coastal areas.

Rammed earth at plinth level. Stabilized with 6% cement. Needs DPC above and below. Auroville technique.

notes: TNEB-approved panel. 40A/63A for residential. Schneider/Havells. Install at compound wall height per EB norms.
